subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God, in Shiraz thou art attuned to the fragrances of the All-Merciful and art a source of joy and gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید الحمد لله در شیراز بنفحات رحمن دمسازید و سبب فرح و سرور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
